Skip To Main Content 
# Regalia Activ Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![banner-logo](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/productdetails-banner-1?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Cardeffective 15th May 2026.
What's in store for you
  * [Card Benefits & Features ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card#benefits "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card#control "Card Management & Controls")
  * [Frequently Asked Questions ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card#faq)


![PPF Account](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/indianoil-card?fmt=webp-alpha)
## Card Benefits & Features
### Travel & Reward Point Benefits
  * Up to 12 complimentary airport lounge access within India and 6 outside India.*
  * 10,000 Bonus Reward Points on spends of ₹5 lakh, and an additional 5,000  
Reward Points on spends of ₹8 lakh in an anniversary year.*
  * 4 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent (On all eligible retails spends.*)
  * _*T &C Apply._
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://lms.hoi.in/lounge-list/RC1) for list of domestic lounges, to be checked before approaching an airport lounge.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_Regalia_Priority_Pass1/Regalia_Priority_Pass.aspx) to apply for Priority Pass for self and add-on members.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Zero Lost Card Liability: In the unfortunate event of losing your HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card, on reporting it immediately to our 24-hour call centre, you have zero liability on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card.
  * Revolving Credit: Enjoy Revolving Credit on your HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card at nominal interest rate. Refer to the Fees and Charges section to know more [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/fees-and-charges).
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India ( on minimum transaction of ₹400 and maximum transaction of ₹5,000 ). [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/pdf/regalia-fuel.pdf) for details.
  * Renewal fee waived off if you spend more than ₹3 lakh in the previous year.
  * Convert eligible high-value purchases into EMIs after the transaction. To know more, [Click Here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi).


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Air Accident Death Cover: Coverage of up to ₹1 crore (USD 125,000)*
  * Emergency Overseas Hospitalisation: Coverage of up to ₹15 lakh (USD 18,750)*
  * Lost Card Liability Cover: Protection of up to ₹9 lakh*
  * [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/pdf/coverages-regalia.pdf) for details.
  * [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://leads.hdfcbank.com/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx?_ga=2.26251124.810244122.1556024278-537237991.1553082495) to update your nominee details.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Management & Controls
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Lounge Access
  4. ### Priority Pass
  5. ### Reward Point/CashBack Redemption & Validity
  6. ### Contactless Payment
  7. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


##  Card Management & Controls 
  * **Single Interface  
**One unified platform for managing Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag, and Business Loans.
  * **Spend Tracking  
**An easy-to-use interface to monitor and manage all your business expenses seamlessly.
  * **Reward Points  
**Effortlessly view and redeem reward points with just a click.


![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/ Renewal Membership Fee: ₹2,500/- + Applicable Taxes.
  * Annual Membership Fee: Waived on spends of ₹3 lakh or more in an anniversary year.


[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/pdf/mitc-201-64.pdf) to view details of HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card fees and charges.
![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Lounge Access 
**Complimentary Airport Lounge Access within India**
  * 12 complimentary access within India (both at domestic and international terminals) using the HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card.
  * Swipe your HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card at the lounge to avail the complimentary lounge access.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/pdf/rg-and-ra-lounge-list-tncs.pdf) to check the list of lounges.


**Note:** Visits exceeding the complimentary quota & Lounges not covered under the programme will be allowed at the discretion of lounge and will also be chargeable by the Lounge.
![Lounge Access](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Priority Pass 
  * Using Priority Pass, you and your add-on member can together avail up to 6 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year, outside India.


  * You can apply for Priority Pass for self and add-on members once you complete minimum 4 retail transactions on your HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card.  
[Click here](https://v.hdfcbank.com/maintenance.html) to apply.


  * If you exceed the 6 Complimentary visits, you will be charged at US $27 + GST per visit


  * If you use your Priority Pass for lounge access within India, you will be charged at US $27 + GST per visit


  * Guests accompanying primary card holder must have an Add-on Credit Card with their own Priority Pass.


**To know about your lounge access history:**
Please write a mail to _pp@prioritypass.com.hk._ Please provide name, complete 18-digit Priority Pass number and state that PP Membership is via HDFC Bank program. If there is more than 1 Priority Pass number (belonging to add on PP holders), kindly provide all the PP Numbers.
Note: Priority Pass in India will attract charges on your Credit Card. You can visit [www.prioritypass.com(opens in a new tab)](https://www.prioritypass.com/) for complete list of lounge details.
![Priority Pass](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Reward Point/CashBack Redemption & Validity 
Reward Points Accrual:
  * Earn 4 Reward Points on every ₹200 retail* spends including Insurance.
  * Earn 10,000 Reward Points on annual spends of ₹5 lakh.
  * Earn additional 5,000 Reward Points on annual spends of ₹8 lakh.
  * Maximum of 500 reward points can be earned in a calendar month on UPI spends. For more information on UPI spends on RuPay Credit Card, [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/rupay-cc-on-upi).


Reward Point Redemption:
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfc.bank.in/v2/foryou) or [NetBanking(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/).


Reward Points can be redeemed for:
  * Flights and hotel bookings via Smartbuy at a value of 1 RP = ₹0.5
  * Airmiles conversion through netbanking at a value of 1RP = ₹0.5 airmile
  * Products and Vouchers via Netbanking or SmartBuy at a value of 1 RP = up to ₹0.35
  * CashBack at a value of 1 RP = ₹0.20


[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/pdf/rp-regalia.pdf) to know more.
![Reward Points Accrual](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Contactless Payment 
  * The HDFC Bank Regalia Activ Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments, facilitating fast, convenient and secure payments at retail outlets.
  * To see if your Card is contactless, look for the contactless network symbol on your Card.


(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder has to enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons).
![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/personal-mitc) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.


**NOTE:** For card sourced starting 01-11- 2020, Below T&Cs is applicable
The Bank reserves the right to cancel the Card in case the Card remains inactive and is not used for effecting any transaction for a continuous period of 6 (Six) months after prior written notice sent on the email address and/or phone number and/or communication address, registered in the records of the Bank.
![Most Important Terms and Conditions  ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What should be the minimum income of the customer?
The customer should have a net income of at least ₹25,000/month.
### 
Can the staff and the customer know of the Credit Card limit for each customer? If no, when and how will the customer get to know the credit limit?
No, welcome kit of Regalia Credit Card contains all information including credit limit, last 4 digits of card and ultra-form explaining product features.
**Note** – This is industry wide practice followed by all Credit Card issuers
### 
How can the approximate credit limit be calculated and communicated to the customer by the home loan staff?
A Credit Card limit will usually be 2.5 times of net monthly take-home salary of customer. However, actual credit limit will be assigned by bank’s underwriting team subject to internal checks of bank. Hence, credit limit should not be communicated to customer upfront
### 
What is an “anniversary year”?
Anniversary year is 365 days from card open date. Eg: 15th July, 2024 is the card open date, then customer anniversary year will be from 15th July, 2024 to 14th July, 2025 and so on.
### 
If same Credit Card variant is offered to all customers, what will be the differentiating factors for customers of different income range?
Credit limit assigned to customer will be the differentiating factor for customer with different income range.
### 
Is the Credit Card completely free of charge (Joining & Renewal) for first 3 years?
Yes, there is no joining and renewal fee for the first 3 years.
### 
What will be the applicable fees post first 3 years? In which scenario can the CC be free of charge even after first 3 years?
HDFC bank Regalia Credit Card ₹25,00+GST. If customer spends ₹3 lacs in an anniversary year, he/she will not be charged with membership fee.
### 
How can the Credit Card be free for customers whose maximum credit limit is less than ₹3L per annum? (Considering ₹3L spends per annum is considered for renewal fee waiver?)
The ask is ₹3L spends per annum which translates to ₹25,000 spends in a month.
### 
What type of spends are not considered for redemption of RP?
Credit Card spends are for accrual of RP. RP redemption can be done via NetBanking or SmartBuy platform.
### 
What is the RP and cash value ratio?
Reward Points can be redeemed for:
  * Flights and hotel bookings via Smartbuy at a value of 1 RP = ₹0.5
  * Airmiles conversion through NetBanking at a value of 1RP = ₹0.5 airmile
  * Products and Vouchers via NetBanking or SmartBuy at a value of 1 RP = up to ₹ 0.35
  * CashBack at a value of 1 RP = ₹0.20


### 
What are the insurance benefits included in Regalia Credit Card?
  * Accidental air death cover worth ₹1 Crore
  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation: up to ₹15 lakh
  * Lost Card Liability Cover: Up to ₹9 lakh


For more information, please [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/regalia-activ-credit-card/pdf/insurance-for-regalia-activ.pdf).
### 
What is the TAT for activating the Credit Card? From which date is this considered – date of the lead submission or date of receipt of card?
Customer has to active Credit Card within 37 days of card setup. Card setup date is the date on which Credit Card is setup in bank’s system
### 
What benefits/ vouchers does the customer get on activating Credit Card?
A Gift voucher worth ₹250 (Amazon voucher) will be provided on activating Credit Card within 37 days.
### 
How can the customer activate the Credit Card?
Customer can activate Credit Card by doing one of the following:
  * Set Credit Card PIN
  * Set card controls
  * Conducting the 1st transaction


### 
What will happen if card is blocked due to non-activation? Can it be re-activated or a new lead is to be generated?
No, Card cannot be re-activated as per RBI guidelines.
### 
Can customer close credit card after first 3 years? If yes, what is the process for the same?
Customer can place card closure request to the bank and same will be actioned.
### 
Will a customer who was HDFC bank carded earlier be eligible for this exclusive CC offer? What are the factors that will be considered in both cases (yes and no)?
As of now, Exclusive CC Bundling (3 Yrs. Fee pricing) offer is only for New to Bank who agrees to Open HDFC Bank Savings A/C with ACH Mandate (EMI Debit from HDFC Bank savings A/c).
### 
Where can home loan staff check important features such as RP, redemption, process, applicable merchants, etc?
Customers and staff can check product features of Regalia on Product webpage- www.hdfcbank.com/regalia.
### 
How many lounge accesses will be offered to the customer in total per year? Will all be included in the credit card from the date of issue of the card?
Lounge access within India – 2 lounge access per calendar quarter on meeting spends criteria of ₹1 lakh in a calendar quarter.
Lounge access outside India – 6 complimentary lounge access in a calendar year using priority pass.
### 
What is a Priority Pass? How and when will customer receive the same? What is the usage of the Priority Pass?
Customer can apply for Priority Pass for self and add on members once you complete minimum 4 retail transactions on your HDFC Bank Regalia Credit Card. *RuPay cards are not eligible for priority pass.
### 
Can Priority Pass be given to co-applicants? If yes, then how many co-applicants can be considered?
Using Priority Pass, Customer along with add on member can together avail up to 6 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year, outside India. 
### 
In case of multiple Priority Passes, how will lounge access be assigned to all respective persons?
Priority pass will have name printed on the card to differentiate.
